title: Regex Tester
seoDescription: Free online regex tester. Test regular expressions instantly with match highlighting. Supports flags g, i, m. Perfect for developers validating patterns and extracting data.
howToUseTitle: How to Use the Regex Tester
step1Desc: Type your regular expression in the pattern field. Use flags (g for global, i for case-insensitive, m for multiline).
step2Desc: Paste or type the text you want to test your regex against.
step3Desc: Click Test Regex to see all matches, groups, and positions. Matched text is highlighted in real-time.
feature3: Support for g, i, m flags
faq1A: JavaScript regex engine is used. Supports lookahead, capturing groups, character classes, and standard regex syntax.
faq2A: Currently the tester shows matches and groups. Replace functionality coming soon.
faq3A: Yes! Matched text is shown with position, full match, and any captured groups.
